title: Hellzapoppin'
writer: Nat Perrin, Warren Wilson, Alex Gottlieb
actors: Ole Olsen, Chic Johnson, Martha Raye
plot: Olsen and Johnson, a pair of stage comedians, try to turn their play into a movie and bring together a young couple in love, while breaking the fourth wall every step of the way.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 1 nomination total
